Video.summary: Explore the Art of Canvas Painting with nationally acclaimed artist Amit Dutt, winner of the Indian National Academy Award, Bombay Art Society All India Award and many other prestige awards for his unique canvases. Go on a journey with the renowned Indian painter and watch the art happen.
Video.title: Exploring Indian Crafts: The Art of Indian Canvas Painting

Image.alt: Exploring Indian Crafts: The Art of Indian Canvas Painting

Video.summary: Homeowners Helen and Niall are getting nervous - they're a few short months away from the birth of their first child and their never-renovated 1920s home doesn't contain a nursery. Both work full time - so they're relying on designer Samantha Pynn to create a bright and practical room for their new bundle of joy.
Video.title: Pure Design: Helen & Niall's Nursery

Image.alt: Pure Design: Helen & Niall's Nursery

Video.summary: Explore the mysteries and attraction of the ancient art of Tarot Cards. The cards might be centuries old but can still have an inexplicable power to help answer some of life's most important questions. In this programme we explain how to use the cards, shows the basic meaning of the pack and how to conduct a Tarot card reading. We conduct a reading and we can see for ourselves how to explain the possible card interpretations.
Video.title: An Introduction to Tarot

Image.alt: An Introduction to Tarot
An Introduction to Tarot
